sentences.arabic: كَانَ الصَّيَّادُ يَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Ribar je odlazio na more svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: The fisherman used to go to the sea every morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْكَبُ قَارِبًا صَغِيرًا مِنَ الْخَشَبِ.
sentences.translationEn: He would ride a small wooden boat.

sentences.arabic: صَادَ السَّمَكَ وَعَادَ إِلَى بَيْتِهِ فِي الْمَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Lovio je ribu i vraćao se kući navečer.
sentences.translationEn: He caught fish and returned home in the evening.

sentences.arabic: بَاعَ جُزْءًا مِنَ السَّمَكِ فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Dio ribe prodavao je na tržnici.
sentences.translationEn: He sold part of the fish in the market.
